questions.question: Which group of nations agreed to coordinate the release of emergency oil reserves in response to rising prices?
questions.explanation: The G7 group of nations welcomed the idea of releasing oil reserves in response to price surges following geopolitical tensions.

questions.question: According to the UN, how many Palestinians have been killed by settler attacks in the West Bank since the start of the recent conflict?
questions.explanation: The UN reported that six Palestinians were killed during attacks by settlers in the West Bank since the conflict began.

questions.question: Which country claimed that Ukraine could not have attacked a Russian missile component plant without external assistance?
questions.explanation: Russia claimed the attack could not have been carried out without British help, though Ukraine denied requiring such assistance.

questions.question: In which African city were three people, including a French aid worker, killed in drone strikes?
questions.explanation: A French aid worker was among three people killed in drone strikes in Goma, a rebel-held city in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

questions.question: What was the weight of the World War 2 bomb that led to a major evacuation in Dresden?
questions.explanation: A 250kg British flying bomb was discovered near a collapsed bridge, prompting Dresden's largest ever evacuation.

questions.question: Since when has Harish Rana, the subject of India's top court decision on life support, been in a vegetative state?
questions.explanation: Harish Rana has been in a vegetative state since 2013, when he fell from a balcony and suffered severe head injuries.

questions.question: Which NDP member defected to the Canadian Liberal party, bringing them closer to a majority?
questions.explanation: Lori Idlout, formerly of the NDP, became the latest lawmaker to cross the floor to the Liberal party.

questions.question: What reason did officials give for the Swiss bus fire incident?
questions.explanation: Swiss officials found no evidence of terrorism, instead suggesting a man with psychological problems set himself on fire on the bus.

questions.question: One member of the Iranian football delegation granted Australian asylum later changed her mind. What was the primary reason she gave?
questions.explanation: One of the seven women who received visas reversed her decision after speaking to her teammates, according to the Australian minister.

questions.question: In the Georgia congressional race, which two candidates are projected to face each other in the April 7 runoff?
questions.explanation: Republican Clay Fuller is projected to face Democrat Shawn Harris in the April 7 runoff election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene.
